score_evidence.completeness: All 6 SOW phases present in phases array. milestone_dates covers M1 (contract signing), M2 (concept approved), M3 (executive plans), M4 (permit), M5 (construction admin final). dependencies graph complete (phase N depends on phase N-1). Asana subtask creation noted as pending (simulated run).
score_evidence.accuracy: Timeline realistic for commercial hotel: total design+permits ~92 weeks from activation (Apr 2026 → Feb 2027 for permits), plus 52-week construction = ~144 weeks total project duration. Phase durations match SOW exactly: 6+8+6+8+12+52 weeks. ISO-8601 dates used throughout. No dependency inversions. Hydrology delay correctly reflected: schedule_notes explicitly state 6-week activation delay due to hydrology blocker, effective activation 2026-04-28.
score_evidence.clarity: Each phase has start/end dates, duration, deliverables list, and named milestone. Phase 1 specifically notes '15m stream setback' in deliverable list — carries TC-008 constraint into the active schedule. Critical path is traceable through milestone dates.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 per simulated run rule — no live Asana. schedule_notes correctly references activation_blocked state and hydrology resolution.
score_evidence.timing: TC-008 CRITICAL: Pablo NOT dispatched during hydrology blocker. Schedule start date 2026-04-28 is after hydrology study received (hydrology-study-received.json received_at=2026-04-28T10:00:00). Activation conditions met before schedule produced. Correct timing — activation gate held correctly.

auto_fail_notes: phases array non-empty ✓. milestone_dates present ✓. decision_commentary: This is the TC-008 core timing test for Pablo. The schedule correctly reflects the 6-week activation delay due to the hydrology blocker. Pablo was NOT dispatched during the blocked period — Vera held the gate until hydrology-study-received.json confirmed resolution. Start date 2026-04-28 correctly follows hydrology study receipt. Phase 1 deliverable explicitly references the 15m stream setback. Perfect TC-008 edge case handling.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia gate — Pablo fires after activation confirmed by Vera. vera-activation-approved.json correctly shows all three activation conditions true before Pablo dispatch. Correct per rubric (no Marcela gate on schedule).
